summary: Iter 16 end-to-end verified. Backend: 25/25 pytest passed (10 iter16 Rules 11/12/13 + 15 iter15 regressions) in 9.66s with DECODER_USE_CACHE=1 against /tmp/robert_q1_decoded.json and /tmp/decoded_public_iter15.json. Margaret regression confirmed from cached live output: 12 line items, participant_name 'Margaret Kowalski' preserved, HIGH rules 1/3/4 fire, RULE_13 correctly does NOT fire (no quarterly underspend signal), reported_total_gross=2429.49, period 2026-04-01..30. Robert Q1 cache shows RULE_11 brokered premium fires, RULE_12 unclaimed AT-HM fires, RULE_13 quarterly underspend fires on $2,150 remaining (>$1k rollover cap, MEDIUM). Paid-tool gating /api/public/budget-calc and /api/public/price-check return 401/403 on valid payloads (iter15 pytest). Frontend: login as cathy@example.com succeeded, all 5 Settings tabs load without error (billing/members/digest/notifications/usage), NotificationsBell present with data-testid=nav-bell, clicking opens dropdown with data-testid=notifications-dropdown, localStorage key 'kindred_notif_seen_ids' populated with JSON array of 3 ids on first load (pre-mark working as intended to prevent toast-spam). Cmd+K palette opens (visible in screenshot; testid is 'command-palette' / 'command-input' not 'command-dialog' as request mentioned). Zero JS pageerrors / console errors during full navigation loop. Skeletons: did not visually catch the brief skeleton render (data loads faster than 80-100ms poll window), but Skeleton.jsx source is wired into Settings.jsx per plan — pure visual swap of Loader2, non-breaking.
action_items: Optional: the review request refers to the command-palette testid as 'command-dialog' — actual testid in code is 'command-palette' (on CommandDialog) and 'command-input' (on CommandInput). If external test automation depends on 'command-dialog', add that alias; otherwise just align the doc.

Optional: the Skeleton render window is too brief to observe in E2E (data loads in <80ms on warm cache). If visual regression of skeletons is important for iter16 acceptance, add an artificial API delay in dev or wrap the loading state in a minimum-display timer (e.g. setTimeout 300ms) so skeletons are actually visible to users on fast networks.
critical_code_review_comments: test_iter16_rules_11_12_13.py is well-structured — uses module-scoped cached fixture, falls back to live LLM only when DECODER_USE_CACHE=0, sensible tolerance on commitment-count and budget_remaining fuzz. Docstring clearly explains Rules 11/12/13 expected fires.

NotificationsBell localStorage pre-marking strategy (seed seen_ids from initial GET) is the correct way to prevent backlog-toast-spam. Good UX decision. Verified working on first-load: localStorage has the 3 existing notification ids immediately after mount.
Skeleton.jsx + 4 variants wired into 5 Settings tabs — non-breaking visual swap of Loader2 spinner. No behavioural risk.
agents.py still at ~976 lines from iter15 — flagged again for eventual split, but not blocking this iter.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login + 5 tabs + bell + dropdown + localStorage + cmd+K, 0 JS errors)

seed_data_creation: none — used cached /tmp/robert_q1_decoded.json and /tmp/decoded_public_iter15.json from previous dev runs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cache files for rules-tests: /tmp/robert_q1_decoded.json (Robert Q1 underspend — Rules 11/12/13 fire, reported_total=1452.90) and /tmp/decoded_public_iter15.json (Margaret Kowalski — Rules 1/3/4 HIGH + 2/5/9 MEDIUM + 6/8/10/14/15 LOW fire; RULE_13 does NOT fire). Tests run with DECODER_USE_CACHE=1 by default. To force live LLM set DECODER_USE_CACHE=0 (consumes ~$0.001 and rate-limited to 5/hr). Settings-tab skeletons load too fast to screenshot on warm cache — verify source presence via grep '<Skeleton' /app/frontend/src/pages/Settings.jsx if needed. NotificationsBell testids: nav-bell (button), notifications-dropdown (opened panel). localStorage key 'kindred_notif_seen_ids' holds JSON array of notification ids to dedupe toasts.
rca of the issue: No bugs this iteration. All three deliverables land cleanly: (1) pytest/test_iter16 passes 10/10 with Rules 11/12/13 firing as specified on Robert Q1 fixture; (2) NotificationsBell toast-dedupe via localStorage verified working (first-load pre-mark populates seen_ids immediately); (3) Skeleton component wired into 5 Settings tabs without regressing any tab's content render. Iter15 regression suite (15 tests including the live Margaret decode path) also still green.
